value.body:
## Context

Cycle must stay responsive as repositories accumulate tickets, comments, history, and agent event streams.

## Outcome

A benchmark suite measures core local workloads and defines budgets before product scale hides regressions.

## Acceptance criteria

- Benchmarks cover repository open/bootstrap, projection sync, issue list filtering, search, history/diff reads, inbox summary, and agent event streaming.
- Fixtures include small, medium, and large repository datasets.
- CI or a documented local command reports timing and memory metrics.
- Performance budgets are documented for desktop-visible workflows.
- At least one regression test or threshold guards the highest-risk path.

frontmatter.title: Add performance benchmarks for projection, search, lists, and agent streams

value.title: Add performance benchmarks for projection, search, lists, and agent streams
